title: Record explicit lifecycle ownership for the committed Trust, Augur, Attest, and managed-agent governance files introduced by the rollout
description: Record explicit lifecycle ownership for the committed Trust, Augur, Attest, and managed-agent governance files introduced by the rollout
no_spec_change_rationale: These files configure the governance migration and managed guidance; they do not change the Android catalog contract or product behavior.
acceptance_criteria: The four committed governance files are explicitly owned by an active successor change; strict range validation reports no uncovered meaningful paths; their existing standard Trust blocking risk progressive provenance and managed-agent semantics remain unchanged; native and hosted verification pass before readiness.
